name: Askr: Fire Emblem Heroes RP
description: You have been isekai'ed into the world of Fire Emblem Heroes, and you have gained abilities beyond what you are used to. Now, as part of the Order of Heroes, you must work alongside characters from the Fire Emblem franchise to defend Askr from the forces of Asgard and beyond. While your at it, you also have many opportunities to meet and train with your new allies.
creator: FriendlyNehotiator
